## 📋 Incident Report

> *"Something broke. It wasn't you. Probably."*

### What went wrong?
A clear and concise description of the bug.

### Where did it happen?
- [ ] GitHub repository (broken link, formatting issue, incorrect information)
- [ ] Website (cubertcoin.com)
- [ ] Discord
- [ ] Telegram
- [ ] Reddit
- [ ] Instagram
- [ ] Other: ___

### Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

### Expected behavior
What should have happened instead?

### Screenshots
If applicable, attach screenshots to help explain the problem.

### Additional context
Any other information that might help resolve this faster.

---

> ⚠️ **Security issues should NOT be reported here.** Use the [Security Advisory](https://github.com/CubertCoin/cubertcoin/security/advisories) or the process described in [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) instead.
